title: HOUSING NAVIGATION - 211info
text: FAITH HOPE AND CHARITY HOUSING NAVIGATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide rental deposits and rental application fees. Can provide housing navigation support. 460 SW Madison Avenue Suite 1 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals with verifiable income Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 740-5807 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 740-5807 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Corvallis Services: Rental Application Fee Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTH OPPORTUNITY PROSPERITY AND EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
